articles.title: BPSC 72nd Combined Preliminary exam 2026 postponed; new date to be announced soon
articles.summary: The Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has postponed the Integrated 72nd Combined Preliminary Competitive Examination 2026, originally scheduled for July 26, citing unavoidable reasons. A revised examination date will be announced later.

articles.title: CBSE Class 10 second board result 2026 declared at cbse.gov.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.summary: CBSE has declared the Class 10 Second Board Examination Result 2026 on its official websites. Students who appeared for the optional improvement exam can access their digital marksheets through DigiLocker or the result portals.

articles.title: Railway ALP CBT 2 exam city intimation slip 2026 released at rrbapply.gov.in: Direct link to download here
articles.summary: The Railway Recruitment Board has released the Railway ALP CBT 2 Exam City Intimation Slip 2026 for candidates shortlisted after CBT 1. Aspirants can check their allotted exam city through the official portal using their login credentials.
